domain: furniture hardware, adjustable fittings, architectural connectors, and door/window mechanisms

ideas.product_context: Kitchen and wardrobe cabinetry with hidden European-style hinges.
ideas.core_function: Houses the hinge pivot and damping insert inside a recessed cup mounted in the cabinet door.
ideas.likely_main_part: Machined hinge cup body with mounting ears, pivot bores, damper pocket, and countersunk screw holes.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines cylindrical recesses, thin flanges, coaxial hinge features, countersinks, asymmetric pockets, and tight clearances in a compact part.

ideas.idea_title: Adjustable Wardrobe Sliding Door Roller Carriage
ideas.product_context: Top-hung or bottom-running sliding wardrobe door systems.
ideas.core_function: Supports a sliding door on rollers while allowing height and alignment adjustment after installation.
ideas.likely_main_part: Roller carriage block with axle bosses, threaded height-adjuster seat, guide slot, and door attachment interface.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires nested wheel clearances, offset axle geometry, threaded adjustment features, slots, bosses, and load-bearing wall thickness changes.

ideas.product_context: Flat-pack furniture panels joined by cam-and-dowel fasteners.
ideas.core_function: Captures a rotating cam that pulls a dowel head inward to clamp two panels together.
ideas.likely_main_part: Round cam connector housing with eccentric drive cavity, dowel-entry throat, screwdriver slot, and retention lip.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests eccentric internal geometry, interrupted circular profiles, shallow drive features, undercut-like retention forms, and precise panel-facing datum surfaces.

ideas.product_context: Display cabinets and wall units with movable glass shelves.
ideas.core_function: Supports a glass shelf while providing fine leveling and anti-slip retention.
ideas.likely_main_part: Stepped shelf pin with threaded leveling stem, flattened glass pad, rubber insert recess, and locking shoulder.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Mixes turned cylindrical sections with flats, small recesses, threaded regions, pad geometry, and contact surfaces that must align to a shelf plane.

ideas.idea_title: Architectural Curtain Wall T-Slot Anchor Clamp
ideas.product_context: Aluminum curtain wall framing used to secure panels or mullion accessories.
ideas.core_function: Slides into an extrusion channel and clamps against the slot lips when tightened.
ideas.likely_main_part: T-slot anchor clamp with tapered wedge face, threaded boss, anti-rotation tabs, and bearing shoulders.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests channel-specific geometry, wedge angles, slot engagement lips, asymmetric anti-rotation features, and threaded load paths.

ideas.product_context: Heavy frameless or timber pivot doors in architectural interiors.
ideas.core_function: Supports the lower pivot spindle and transfers door weight into the floor-mounted pivot assembly.
ideas.likely_main_part: Bearing shoe block with vertical spindle bore, thrust washer recess, door-edge mounting holes, and alignment datum faces.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires deep bores, concentric bearing seats, countersunk fasteners, thick-to-thin transitions, and accurately related mounting and pivot axes.

ideas.product_context: European-style tilt-and-turn window perimeter locking systems.
ideas.core_function: Receives a mushroom cam from the sash hardware and locks it against the window frame.
ideas.likely_main_part: Frame-mounted keeper with ramped cam entry, captive locking pocket, slotted adjustment holes, and raised wear pads.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests ramped contact surfaces, partial pockets, elongated mounting slots, small reliefs, and geometry tied to the path of a rotating locking cam.

ideas.idea_title: Concealed Door Closer Arm Linkage Block
ideas.product_context: Concealed overhead door closers used in commercial doors.
ideas.core_function: Connects the closer arm to a sliding track while allowing pivoting motion under spring load.
ideas.likely_main_part: Linkage block with cross pin bore, sliding shoe interface, arm clevis pocket, and lubrication groove.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Combines clevis-style geometry, precision pin bores, sliding contact faces, grooves, filleted load paths, and clearance for angular movement.

ideas.product_context: Architectural glass balustrades with mounted handrail supports.
ideas.core_function: Clamps onto a glass panel and provides an adjustable saddle for a round or oval handrail.
ideas.likely_main_part: Clamp body half with glass pad recess, handrail saddle boss, adjustment screw seat, and alignment ribs.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Tests curved saddle geometry, pad pockets, split-clamp interfaces, threaded adjustment seats, and multiple functional surfaces at different angles.

ideas.idea_title: Flush Sliding Door Edge Pull Mechanism Cup
ideas.product_context: Pocket doors and flush sliding interior doors.
ideas.core_function: Provides a recessed finger pull and houses a small pivoting tab that can be pulled from the door edge.
ideas.likely_main_part: Recessed edge-pull cup with curved finger cavity, pivot pin bosses, tab clearance pocket, and countersunk fixing holes.
ideas.why_it_tests_cad_representation: Requires sculpted ergonomic recesses, thin edge flanges, pin bosses, internal clearance volumes, countersinks, and door-edge mounting constraints.
